name: mf-plugin-musicbrainz
title: MusicBrainz (Go)
author: music-free
description: MusicBrainz scraper plugin implemented with Go PDK

api_base_url.description: MusicBrainz server origin only (no /ws/2). The plugin always calls {origin}/ws/2/…

cover_art_base_url.description: Cover Art Archive (or compatible mirror) origin only. Fetches {origin}/release/{releaseId}/front-500

user_agent.description: Required by MusicBrainz API; include contact URL or email when using the public server.
